message.content:
Explore D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-core thoroughly. I need:
1. What framework/language it uses (check composer.json, package.json, etc.)
2. Key config files and their contents (README.md, .env.example, composer.json, .gitlab-ci.yml)
3. Directory structure overview (app/, routes/, config/, etc.)
4. Build/test/lint commands
5. Architecture: how routes, controllers, models, services are organized
6. Any special patterns (multi-tenancy, modules, etc.)

Be thorough - read the key config files fully.
